'''Gary Price''' (born 9 March 1961) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1970s, 1980s and 1990s. He played at representative level for Yorkshire, and Great Britain (Under-18s) [[British Amateur Rugby League Association]] (BARLA) (Under-18s), and at club level for Castleford Juniors ARLFC, [[York Wasps|York]], [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] and [[Featherstone Rovers]], as a {{rlp|sr}}.<ref name="Biography at therhinos.co.uk">{{cite web|url=https://www.therhinos.co.uk/player?PlayGuid=GP987563|title=Biography at therhinos.co.uk|publisher=therhinos.co.uk|date=31 December 2017|accessdate=1 January 2018}}</ref>

==Background==
Gary Price was born in [[Castleford]], [[West Riding of Yorkshire]], England.

==Playing career==
Price started his professional career with [[York Wasps|York]], making 161 appearances for the club between 1979 and 1986, scoring 40 tries. He was part of the team that finished as Second Division champions in the [[1980–81 Rugby Football League season|1980–81 season]], and played in the [[1984 Challenge Cup]] semi-final defeat against [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]].<ref>{{cite web |title=Title-winner Gary Price inducted into York RLFC Hall of Fame |url=https://www.yorkpress.co.uk/sport/yorkcityknights/24839484.title-winner-gary-price-inducted-york-rlfc-hall-fame/ |website=[[The Press (York)|The Press]] |access-date=13 December 2025 |date=7 January 2025}}</ref> He was transferred to [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] in October 1986.<ref>{{cite news |title=Increased bid clinches Price |url=https://www.newspapers.com/image/1184029564/ |work=[[Yorkshire Evening Press]] |page=26 |date=3 October 1986 |via=[[Newspapers.com]] |url-access=subscription}}</ref>

===Featherstone Rovers===
Price was signed by [[Featherstone Rovers]] in August 1989.<ref>{{cite book |editor-last1=Fletcher |editor-first1=Raymond |editor-last2=Howes |editor-first2=David |title=Rothmans Rugby League Yearbook 1990-91 |date=1990 |publisher=Queen Anne Press |location=London |isbn=978-0-356-17851-6 |page=381}}</ref> He made his début for the club on 17 September 1989.<ref name="fevarchive">{{cite web |title=Price, Gary S. |url=https://www.fevarchive.co.uk/players/gary-s-price/809/ |website=fevarchive.co.uk |access-date=30 September 2022}}</ref>

Price played {{rlp|sr}}, in [[Featherstone Rovers]]' 14–20 defeat by [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford Northern]] in the [[1989 Yorkshire Cup]] Final during the [[1989–90 Rugby Football League season|1989–90 season]] at [[Headingley Rugby Stadium|Headingley]], [[Leeds]] on Sunday 5 November 1989, in front of a crowd of 12,607.

From 1993 onwards, he was usually referred to as "Gary S. Price", or by his nickname "Slugger",<ref>{{cite news |title=Cup Kings on March |url=https://www.britishnewspaperarchive.co.uk/viewer/BL/0005104/19940221/151/0036 |work=Yorkshire Evening Post |date=21 February 1994 |page=16 |via=[[British Newspaper Archive]] |url-access=subscription}}</ref> to avoid confusion with another second-rower signed by Rovers, who was also named [[Gary Price (rugby league, born 1969)|Gary Price]] and who played for the club in 1993–95 and again in 1997–98.<ref name="fevarchive" />
